intro: Hieracium sabulosorum, also known as sandy hawkweed, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion family (Asteraceae). This plant has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including fever, inflammation, and gastrointestinal problems, due to its potential health benefits. The bioactive constituents of Hieracium sabulosorum include flavonoids, sesquiterpenes, and phenolic acids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. In herbal medicine, sandy hawkweed is often prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is used to treat conditions such as digestive disorders, respiratory issues, and skin problems.
